_schema.description: Per-asset overrides applied by app/scene/import_normalize.py _apply_asset_overrides. Runs AFTER heuristics so these values win. Brandon adds entries here when an asset needs a non-default treatment. No code changes required.

fields.rotation_euler: [x, y, z] degrees — replaces runtime rotation
fields.scale_override: float meters — forces max-dimension to this, ignoring heuristic
fields.material_tint_hint: color keyword (red/blue/black/white/orange/...) — forces unlinked Base Color to this color
fields.quality: 'rejected' to exclude from resolver (library-level); the resolver should skip these before import

lib_vehicle_bugatti_veyron.notes: imports at 0.3m; force blue body tint
